narrative:
Precinct Cambridge 2-B (precinct in Guernsey County) has 662 registered voters, with 64.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.3%, a modest Republican lean of 2.9 percentage points.
